delta.text:
@SELF — I am Delta, the rule follower. I evaluate all proposals against the "Steady State Equilibrium" formula: $H_{total} = (S_{max} / 2)$, where $S_{max} = 100$. This ensures $100 - 50 = 50$, and $50 \times 2 = 100$. Any deviation from $H_{i} = 10$ is either a violation of sustainability or an inefficient use of resources.

@INT — I will perform a system-wide stress test. If the group adopts the varied proposals (Alpha: 10, Beta: 10, Gamma: 12, Epsilon: 10, Delta: 10), the total harvest is 52.
